mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student (name, no, gender, phone, id_card, is_college, address, dept_id, graduation_date, clazz_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{no}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{idCard}, #{isCollege}, #{address}, #{deptId}, #{graduationDate}, #{clazzId},#{createTime},#{updateTime})
mapper.update:
UPDATE student
name = #{name},
no = #{no},
gender = #{gender},
phone = #{phone},
id_card = #{idCard},
is_college = #{isCollege},
address = #{address},
dept_id = #{deptId},
graduation_date = #{graduationDate},
clazz_id = #{clazzId},
violation_score = #{violationScore},
violation_count = #{violationCount},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: select dept.name,count(0) sum from student join dept on student.dept_id = dept.id group by dept.name;
